query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime black and white photograph of a chain-link fence with a closed gate, flanked by a small wooden shed on the left and a boat on a trailer to the right. Bright lights near and behind the fence cast intense illumination across the lot. The foreground contains grass and weeds, with trees, utility poles, and wires visible against the dark sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime black and white photograph of a neglected, fenced lot featuring a weathered wooden shed and an overgrown yard. Bright lights near the chain-link gate are blown out into harsh starbursts while deep shadows swallow surrounding details, creating extreme exposure contrasts. A boat on a trailer sits partially cut off by the right edge of the frame. The weathered structures and empty yard combine with the harsh lighting to produce an atmosphere of desolation and unease.
